concerns.text: Functional Requirement FR-015 (schema validation) is not anchored to any user story; no story lists FR-015 in its ‘Anchored Requirements’ section.
Functional Requirement FR-017 (deduplication) is not referenced by any user story; it appears only in the FR list.
Functional Requirement FR-018 is empty and unreferenced; it serves no purpose and is orphaned.
Success Criterion SC-003 (use of SciPy and statsmodels for all statistical tests) is not linked to any user story; no story cites SC-003.
